name: Rozie Script Partial (TypeScript)
comment: A `.rzts` script partial is plain TypeScript (NO SFC blocks) that uses Rozie $sigils — a slice of a component's <script> body lifted into its own file (PARTIAL_EXT = /\.(rzts|rzjs)$/ in packages/core/src/ir/inlineScriptPartials.ts). This top-level grammar does nothing but embed source.ts; the distinct $sigil coloring is added by the companion INJECTION grammar source.rozie.ts.injection (rozie-ts-sigils.injection.json), which applies at every nesting depth — an `include` here would only color sigils at the root context (the limitation the SFC <script> block has).
